column1: # BASE CONFIG: best Mini config from s16 (softcap=20, ADAM_WD=0.065, MLR=0.040)
# PURPOSE: Test Tier-1 architecture knobs that have NOT been probed under the current locked config.
#   A5: wider recurrence range LOOP_START=2 LOOP_END=6 (vs SOTA 3-5)
#   A4: PARALLEL_RESIDUAL_START=5 (earlier parallel residual, vs SOTA 7)
# ONE KNOB PER ROW. Decision rule: beats baseline (1.6997) by ≥0.003 → flag for Spark confirmation.
# A2/A3/A5 (NUM_LOOPS=3, LOOP_START=2, LOOP_END=6) — SKIPPED: OOM on Nano (7.4GB).
# Extra loop passes exceed CUDA allocator limit. Reserve these for AGX/Spark.
